Speaker 1: Ohh, here comes my dad and stepmum. Mister and Misses Geller, this is Steven and Andrea Waltham.
Steven: Hello. Hello. How do you do? How do you do? Very nice to meet you. Darling it’s the Gellers. Darling, it’s the Gellers. She’s very self-absorbed, you know. I should never have married her.
Darling:  Sorry, what?
Steven: It’s the Gellers!
Darling: Where?
Steven: Well there’s one  and there’s another.
Darling: Lovely to meet you.
Steven: Terribly nice of you to offer to pay for half the wedding.
Speaker 4: Ohh forget it. Too hell with tradition, we’re happy to do it.
Speaker 5: We know how expensive weddings can be, besides this may be the only wedding we get to throw.
Speaker 6: Ha ha, a joke that’s funny in all countries.
